name: oai-compatible-copilot
description: The connective adapter that bridges GitHub Copilot Chat with an Agentic Router.

commands.title: Generate Commit Message with OAICopilot - Stop

oaicopilot.logLevel.description: Debug log level. Logs are written to ~/.copilot/oaicopilot/logs/ as JSON lines. Default is 'off' (no logging).

oaicopilot.baseUrl.description: Base URL of the Agentic Router (or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint) this extension talks to. All chat requests for the single exposed model are sent here.

oaicopilot.modelId.description: The single model id sent (as the 'model' field) to the endpoint and shown in the Copilot model picker. Defaults to 'agentic-router' for single-model Agentic Router setups; set it to a configured route name (e.g. 'gpt-5.4') when the router does normal multi-model routing. Leave empty to expose no model. Not editable from the configuration UI.

oaicopilot.modelName.description: (Optional) Display name for the model in the Copilot model picker. Defaults to the model id when empty.

oaicopilot.apiMode.description: Protocol used to talk to the endpoint: 'openai' (Default) for OpenAI Chat Completions (/chat/completions), 'openai-responses' for OpenAI Responses (/responses), 'ollama' for Ollama (/api/chat), 'anthropic' for Anthropic (/v1/messages), 'gemini' for Gemini (*/v1beta/models/{model}:streamGenerateContent?alt=sse).

oaicopilot.allowInsecureTls.description: Skip TLS certificate verification — only for localhost/127.0.0.1/::1 endpoints (e.g. a local dev proxy with a self-signed certificate). Never applied to remote hosts even when enabled. Leave disabled unless you understand the risk.

oaicopilot.warnOnHttp1.description: Show a warning (and log it) the first time a request connects over HTTP/1.1 instead of negotiating HTTP/2 with the configured endpoint. Requests still work either way — HTTP/2 is opportunistic, not required.

enabled.description: Enable retry mechanism for api errors. Default is true.

max_attempts.description: Maximum number of retry attempts. Default is 3.

interval_ms.description: Interval between retry attempts in milliseconds. Default is 1000 (1 seconds).

status_codes.description: Additional HTTP status codes that will be merged. Default is [429, 500, 502, 503, 504].

oaicopilot.retry.description: Retry configuration for handling api errors like [429, 500, 502, 503, 504].

oaicopilot.delay.description: Fixed delay in milliseconds between consecutive requests. Default is 0 (no delay).

oaicopilot.commitLanguage.description: Language for generated Git commit messages. Default is English.

oaicopilot.commitMessagePrompt.description: Custom system prompt for commit message generation. If not provided, uses the default prompt.

oaicopilot.readFileLines.description: Number of lines to read when using `read_file` tool. Large lines may cost more tokens. Default is 0, let model decide lines.
